languages.text: "Ты не первый святотатец, назвавший истинную веру "бессмысленной". И не первый святотатец, которому предстоит расплатиться за ошибку".

traits.locale_text: "Ты не первый святотатец, назвавший истинную веру "бессмысленной". И не первый святотатец, которому предстоит расплатиться за ошибку".
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "You are not the first blasphemer to call the true faith 'meaningless.' And you will not be the first to pay for their mistake."
languages.original_text: "Ты не первый святотатец, назвавший истинную веру "бессмысленной". И не первый святотатец, которому предстоит расплатиться за ошибку".

traits.locale_text: "You are not the first blasphemer to call the true faith 'meaningless'. And not the first blasphemer to pay for this mistake."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "You are not the first blasphemer to call the true faith 'meaningless'. And not the first blasphemer to pay for this mistake."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "You are not the first blasphemer to call the true faith 'meaningless.' And you will not be the first to pay for their mistake."

traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "You are not the first blasphemer to call the true faith 'meaningless.' And you will not be the first to pay for their mistake."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "Du bist nicht der erste Lästerer, der den wahren Glauben als 'bedeutungslos' bezeichnet. Und du wirst nicht der erste sein, der für seinen Fehler bezahlen muss."
languages.original_text: "You are not the first blasphemer to call the true faith 'meaningless.' And you will not be the first to pay for their mistake."

traits.locale_text: "Du bist nicht der erste Lästerer, der den wahren Glauben als 'bedeutungslos' bezeichnet. Und du wirst nicht der erste sein, der für seinen Fehler bezahlen muss."

languages.text: Vous n'êtes pas le premier blasphémateur à qualifier la vraie foi de "vide de sens". Et vous ne serez pas le premier à payer pour leur erreur."
languages.original_text: "You are not the first blasphemer to call the true faith 'meaningless.' And you will not be the first to pay for their mistake."

traits.locale_text: Vous n'êtes pas le premier blasphémateur à qualifier la vraie foi de "vide de sens". Et vous ne serez pas le premier à payer pour leur erreur."

languages.text: "No eres el primer blasfemo que llama a la verdadera fe 'sin sentido'. Y no serás el primero en pagar por su error".
languages.original_text: "You are not the first blasphemer to call the true faith 'meaningless.' And you will not be the first to pay for their mistake."

traits.locale_text: "No eres el primer blasfemo que llama a la verdadera fe 'sin sentido'. Y no serás el primero en pagar por su error".

languages.text: "Gerçek inanca 'anlamsız' diyen ilk kâfir siz değilsiniz. Ve onların hatalarının bedelini ödeyen ilk kişi de sen olmayacaksın."
languages.original_text: "You are not the first blasphemer to call the true faith 'meaningless.' And you will not be the first to pay for their mistake."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçek inanca 'anlamsız' diyen ilk kâfir siz değilsiniz. Ve onların hatalarının bedelini ödeyen ilk kişi de sen olmayacaksın."
